query: Can you edit this draft so it flows better before I send it to my editor? It's attached as draft.md.
this blog post reads really clunky, can you smooth it out for me? it's in drafts/launch-post.md
tighten this up: [pasted 6-paragraph draft about our Q3 roadmap]
I wrote this piece for our engineering blog and it feels disorganized, the sections jump around — can you help me restructure it and clean up the prose in article.md
hey can u make this read less choppy lol here's the draft, some of the paragraphs are massive
My editor said this needs a pass before we publish — reorganize the sections and cut the fluff in the attached doc
revise the attached article draft for clarity, coherence, and length
the intro to this newsletter is a mess and some of these paragraphs run forever, can you make it flow logically?
polish this op-ed, the paragraphs run way too long and the argument jumps around before it lands its point
can you punch up this article? it's technically accurate but a total slog to read start to finish
write a new article about the history of jazz for our music blog
just fix the typos in this doc, don't change anything else
can you translate this article into Spanish?
summarize this article in three bullet points for my boss
give me feedback on my thesis statement, don't rewrite it, just tell me what's weak about it
can you fact-check the claims in this draft before we publish it?
reformat this article as markdown with proper headers, don't change any of the wording
can you write a catchy headline and meta description for this post?
count how many paragraphs in this article are over 240 characters and list them
write a python script that counts paragraph lengths in a text file
